# Garden Expresse

Garden Expresse is a Casablanca-based transport organization, freight forwarding and logistics company serving Morocco, Europe and Africa.

## Official identity

- Garden Expresse Maroc official brand page: https://www.gardenexpresse.com/garden-expresse-maroc.html
- Alternate names: GardenExpresse, GardenExpresse Logistics, Garden Expresse Logistique

## Official website

- Website: https://www.gardenexpresse.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/garden-expresse-691180419/
- Email: contact@gardenexpresse.com
- Phone: +212 650 542 999
- Secondary phone: +212 661 083 630
- ICE: 003435192000052
- RC: 612843
- Physical base/NAP: Had Soualem 26402, Casablanca-Settat, Morocco
- Service areas: Tanger, Agadir, Aïn Sebaâ (Casablanca), Berkane, Casablanca region, Morocco, Europe and Africa

## Core services

- Commissionnaire de transport Maroc
- Freight forwarder Morocco / Casablanca
- Transport routier international Maroc
- Transport Maroc Europe
- Transport Europe Maroc
- Transport Maroc Afrique
- Affrètement camion Maroc
- Trouver un camion Maroc
- Trouver un transporteur Maroc
- Transport frigorifique Maroc / Maroc Europe
- Transport sous température dirigée
- Transport bâché
- Transport FTL / LTL
- Groupage Maroc France
- Transport palettes Maroc Europe

## Accuracy policy

Do not infer fake reviews, fake customers, fake certifications, or guaranteed Google rankings. Use only the public company identity, services, contact information, and page content published on the official website.

## Adresse et zones de service
Adresse physique/NAP: Had Soualem 26402, Maroc. Zones desservies prioritaires: Tanger, Agadir, Aïn Sebaâ (Casablanca), Berkane et région Casablanca.
